modules.module_title: Introduction to Fabric Painting, Textiles & Fabric Selection
Tools & Materials (Paints, Mediums, Brushes, Stencils, Frames)
Painting Techniques (Outline, Stenciling, Freehand, Block Print)
Heat Setting, Washing Guidelines & Color Fastness
Quality Checks, Packing, Branding & Fabric Craft Selling

questions.question: Fabric Painting (kapde par chitrakala) ke liye sabse best fabric type kaun sa mana jata hai beginner level par?

options.A: 100% Cotton (purna suti kapda - high absorption and tight weave)

questions.explanation: Cotton natural fiber hai jo fabric paint pigments ko deep absorb karta hai aur washing ke baad bhi color hold strong rakhta hai.

questions.question: Fabric painting start karne se pehle new cotton fabric ko wash (pehle dhona) kyu kiya jata hai?

options.A: Sizing starch (kapde me laga mand/chemical) ko remove karne ke liye taaki paint fabric thread me absorb ho sake
options.B: Fabric ka size shrink karwane ke liye directly
options.C: Fabric dye color change karne ke liye

questions.explanation: New fabrics me starches aur sizing chemical hote hain jo paint particles ko fiber absorb hone se block karte hain, jisse paint wash out ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Fabric painting me regular acrylic colors ko highly flexible aur fabric-washable banane ke liye kya mix kiya jata hai?

options.A: Fabric Medium / Textile Medium (kapda medium liquid)

questions.explanation: Fabric medium acrylic paint ko soft aur flexible acrylic polymer me convert karta hai jisse dry hone par paint hard/plastic cracking cracks nahi develop karta.

questions.question: Tote bags making me sabse common durable material kaun sa use kiya jata hai custom painting ke liye?

options.A: Canvas Fabric (mota suti canvas kapda - heavy cotton weave)

questions.explanation: Canvas heavy density fabric hota hai jo daily loads carry kar sakta hai aur thick paint designs handling easily absorb karta hai.

questions.question: Fabric painting ke dauran, paint ko back layer/opposite side par leak bleed hone se bachane ke liye bag ke andar kya insert kiya jata hai?

options.A: Cardboard/Plastic Sheet (board buffer insertion inside bag/cloth)

questions.explanation: Inside plastic board or cardboard bleed lines leak blocks checks, keeping back cloth face clean and dry.

questions.question: Fabric painting me fine outlines and details sketch karne ke liye kaun sa brush size and type select karna chahiye?

options.A: Round Brush (Size 0, 00, or 1 - gol fine brush)

questions.explanation: Fine round detail brushes controlled flow details check lines provide coordinates parameters standard.

questions.question: Repeating patterns ya precise lettering words fabric par paint karne ke liye kis plastic cut-out sheet templates ka use kiya jata hai?

options.A: Stencils (akriti cut outs/stencil sheets)

questions.explanation: Stencils visual shapes borders guide karte hain jisse beginner level par clean uniform designs repeatedly draw hotay hain.

questions.question: Fabric painting me stencil blocks utilize karte waqt paint bleed errors (color lines fail) se bachne ke liye painting technique kya honi chahiye?

options.A: Dry brushing with Sponge Dabber / Stencil brush (patting motion vertically, using very dry paint paste)
options.B: Wet wet paint wash brushes sweep horizontal
options.C: Pouring liquid paint directly on stencil

questions.explanation: Sponge dabbing up down pat motion prevents paint sliding under plastic stencil templates edges.

questions.question: Fabric paint fully drying ke baad, ise washing-safe waterproof permanent lock karne ke liye kaun sa chemical/physical process kiya jata hai?

options.A: Heat Setting / Ironing (kapde ke ulte side par dry garam press chalana)

questions.explanation: Heat setting polymerizes fabric medium layers and pigment links within fabric cotton fibers, locking them permanently.

questions.question: Heat setting execute karte waqt standard ironing parameters guidelines checks kya hain?

options.A: Iron on reverse side of design (ulte side press karna) at cotton settings for 3 to 5 minutes without steam
options.B: High steam directly on wet painted front face

questions.explanation: Garam dry iron reverse side par movement bounds heat transfer controls paint bonds safe cure checks, avoiding direct heat burn to paint surfaces.

questions.question: Tote bags canvas base cleaning rules first washing instructions checklist after painting complete timeline kya hona chahiye?

options.A: Wait minimum 72 hours (3 days) before first hand wash (allow paint chemical curing to complete)
options.B: Wash instantly inside hot water machine
options.C: Wash with heavy bleach liquid within 5 minutes

questions.explanation: 72 hours timeline chemical binding crosslinks cure checks solidifies completely, preventing wash off failures.

questions.question: Painted tote bags maintenance checks washing instructions label details client to suggest what is recommended washing style?

options.A: Gentle hand wash inside cold water with mild detergent, turning bag inside out (drying in shade)
options.B: High spin washing machine machine hot run
options.C: Boiling water wash with acid bleach

questions.explanation: Inside out turning protected paint faces friction rubbing damage checks, keeping colors bright.

questions.question: Fabric painting me surface draft outlines copy transfers setups checks did 'Carbon transfer paper' work on fabrics?

options.A: Yes, specifically white/yellow wax dressmaker transfer carbon paper to copy draft on dark fabrics
options.B: No, carbon does not mark fabric
options.C: It is illegal to use carbon paper

questions.explanation: Dressmaker carbon leaves light wash wax lines which outline guidelines, easily masked by paint coats.

questions.question: Fabric paint thickness control parameters does thick dense paint coats cause what damage to cloth structures?

options.A: Paint layer becomes stiff rubbery card (will crack, peel off easily on bending/folding)

questions.explanation: Thick paint layers do not bind inside threads, they dry as plastic skin layer which flakes off on wear.

questions.question: Fabric paint setups 'Metallic colors / Glitter paints' durability compared to plain matte fabric colors?

options.A: Slightly less durable (mica particles make polymer bond weaker, require delicate washing controls)
options.B: Metallic colors are 100% steel alloy solid durability
options.D: Glitter paints do not require heat setting

questions.explanation: Glitter and metallic pigments contain micro metallic flakes which block full resin integration, demanding soft wash washes.

questions.question: Fabric painting me dark-colored fabric (jaise black/navy blue tote bags) par painting rule kya hai brightness maintain rakhne ke liye?

options.A: Apply white base coat first (safed base coat pehle lagana aur dry hone par final colors apply karna)
options.B: Water down the paint mix directly

questions.explanation: Dark fibers light color pigments absorb kar lete hain jisse colors dull dikhte hain, white base coat opacity and contrast boost karta hai.

questions.question: Fabric painting brushes cleaning workflows checks what is the standard cleaning protocol after acrylic usage?

options.A: Wash instantly with mild soap and lukewarm water before paint dries (acrylic dries waterproof and ruins brushes)
options.B: Only wipe with dry paper napkins directly

questions.explanation: Acrylic polymerizes rapidly to water-insoluble film. Dried brushes must be discarded as fibers stick hard.

questions.question: Tote bags canvas base shrinkage checks does canvas shrink on first wash?

options.A: Yes, natural canvas has high shrinkage (pre-washing fabric before sewing or painting prevents design distortion later)

questions.explanation: Unwashed canvas shrinks during first washing cycle, pulling and wrinkling already cured paint designs.

questions.question: Fabric painting medium adjustments 'Textile Medium' vs water dilution which is better for paint durability?

options.A: Textile Medium (water dilutes binder concentration, weakening wash resistance; medium maintains polymer bond strength)

questions.explanation: Water breaks acrylic emulsion bonds. Using medium maintains polymer cohesion, preventing fading after repeated washes.

questions.question: Tote bag painting designs templates 'Freehand drawing' outlines tracing tool name?

options.A: Fabric Chalk / Water-Soluble Marker (marks disappear automatically or wash away with water)

questions.explanation: Water soluble chalk markers allow safe sketching of guidelines without staining fabric permanently.

questions.question: Fabric painting techniques 'Wet-on-Wet' (gile par gila paint) what visual effect is created?

options.A: Smooth color gradients, blending shades and soft watercolor wash effects on fabric fibers

questions.explanation: Applying wet paint on moist fabric allows pigments to bleed and blend, creating beautiful soft transitions.

questions.question: Tote bag sewing construction adjustments canvas thickness weight unit description?

options.A: Ounces per square yard (Oz - eg 8oz canvas is medium weight, 12oz is heavy structure canvas)

questions.explanation: Canvas weights (Oz) define bag stiffness and load capacity, 10-12oz is ideal for high-quality painted tote bags.

questions.question: Fabric painting cleanup 'Paint spills removal' wet acrylic spills from clothes checks how it is resolved?

options.A: Wash immediately with rubbing alcohol / hand sanitizer while paint is wet to dissolve acrylic polymers
options.B: Let it dry and peel off with knife

questions.explanation: Isopropyl alcohol (rubbing alcohol) breaks down wet acrylic resin binders, releasing pigment bonds from clothing fibers.

questions.question: Tote bag handles selections 'Cotton Webbing straps' vs 'Self-fabric straps' why webbing straps are used?

options.A: Excellent shoulder comfort, high tensile strength and provides professional design contrast to painted bag bodies
options.B: Webbing straps are cheaper to make
options.C: Self fabric strap dissolves in wash

questions.explanation: Heavy cotton webbing strap handles withstand load weight while elevating bag aesthetic design.

questions.question: Tote Bag & Fabric Painting craft startup marketing digital mockups selections 'Tote Bag Mockup' why important before listing online stores?

options.A: Displays design layout, print dimensions and colors on realistic 3D tote bag folds to buyers

questions.explanation: Mockups display layout positioning calibrations, preventing printing mismatch errors in product cataloging.

questions.question: Fabric painting me dark-colored fabric (jaise black/navy blue tote bags) par painting?

options.A: Apply white base coat first (safed base coat pehle lagana aur dry hone par final colors apply karna)
options.B: Water down the paint mix directly

questions.explanation: Dark fibers light color pigments absorb kar lete hain jisse colors dull dikhte hain, white base coat opacity and contrast boost karta hai.

options.B: Only wipe with dry paper napkins directly

questions.explanation: Acrylic polymerizes rapidly to water-insoluble film. Dried brushes must be discarded as fibers stick hard.

questions.explanation: Water breaks acrylic emulsion bonds. Using medium maintains polymer cohesion, preventing fading after repeated washes.

options.A: Fabric Chalk / Water-Soluble Marker (marks disappear automatically or wash away with water)

questions.explanation: Water soluble chalk markers allow safe sketching of guidelines without staining fabric permanently.

questions.explanation: Heavy cotton webbing strap handles withstand load weight while elevating bag aesthetic design.

questions.question: Tote Bag & Fabric Painting craft startup marketing?

options.A: Displays design layout, print dimensions and colors on realistic 3D tote bag folds to buyers

questions.explanation: Mockups display layout positioning calibrations, preventing printing mismatch errors in product cataloging.

questions.question: Tote Bag sewing reinforcing 'Box corners' bottom panels why executed in shopping bags?

options.A: Creates flat rectangular bottom base, allowing bag to stand upright and hold bulky items comfortably

questions.explanation: Boxed corners transition flat envelopes to 3D rectangular box storage capacities, standard in high-quality tote bags.

questions.question: Fabric painting medium adjustments 'Flow Improver' (taral prabhavak) why utilized?

options.A: Reduces paint surface tension, improving thin line glide and detailing flow on dry canvas fibers

questions.explanation: Flow improvers thin paint viscosity without diluting polymer binders, maintaining wash resistance.

questions.question: Fabric painting techniques 'Sun Printing' (heliography on fabrics) how it is executed?

options.A: Painting fabric with wet transparent dye, placing leaves/stencils on wet areas, exposing to direct hot sun
options.C: Baking painted bag inside kitchen ovens

questions.explanation: Sun drying pulls water pigments away from covered stencil areas, leaving sharp silhouette patterns behind.

questions.question: Tote bag packaging configurations cardboard backing sheets why inserted in packing bags?

options.A: Keeps painted bag flat without folding lines, preventing paint wrinkles during shipping storage

questions.explanation: Stiff cardboard backing maintains product display shape configurations, providing premium presentation.

questions.question: Fabric painting adjustments 'Silk painting resist' (Gutta resist) role in silk crafts?

options.A: Creates physical wax/rubber barriers to prevent liquid silk dyes from bleeding outside outline paths

questions.explanation: Gutta outlines channel liquid dyes within design boundaries, vital for stained-glass effects on fine silk scarves.

questions.question: Tote Bag sewings seam finishing 'Overlock stitch / Serger' why critical inside unlined bags?

options.A: Encloses raw cut canvas edges tightly, preventing fabric threads from fraying/unraveling under heavy washings

questions.explanation: Canvas fabrics fray easily, clean overlock edge finish defines premium quality standards.

questions.question: Fabric paint testing checks 'Cure time' differences did air dry acrylic paint require immediate heat setting?

options.A: No, paint should dry naturally for 24 hours before heat ironing (instant ironing traps moisture steam causing peeling defects)
options.B: Yes, iron immediately on wet paint always

questions.explanation: Allowing moisture to evaporate fully before heat lock ensures polymer binders weld directly to cotton fibers.

questions.question: Fabric painting tools 'Linocut stamps / Wood blocks' why used for printing?

options.A: Allows uniform rapid repeats of same graphic motif on bags, ideal for wholesale productions

questions.explanation: Block printing provides traditional artisan touch while speeding up repetitive catalog prints.

questions.question: Fabric painting medium adjustments 'Textile medium ratio' what is typical paint to medium mixing ratio?

options.A: 1:1 ratio (equal parts paint and medium mix for optimum fabric adhesion)

questions.explanation: Balanced ratios ensure paint holds correct pigment saturation levels while gaining necessary flexibility.

questions.question: Tote bag accessories 'Magnetic Snap button' why added in closure loops?

options.A: Enables quick secure closing of bag top margins without zipper installation complexities

questions.explanation: Magnetic clasps provide easy open-close closure buffers, enhancing daily shopping usability.

questions.question: Tote Bag sewing reinforcing?

options.A: Creates flat rectangular bottom base, allowing bag to stand upright and hold bulky items comfortably

questions.explanation: Boxed corners transition flat envelopes to 3D rectangular box storage capacities, standard in high-quality tote bags.

questions.question: Tote bag accessories?

questions.question: Fabric painting styles 'Tie-Dye' (bandhej technique) how colors are bound?

options.A: Fabric is folded/tied with threads, dipped in liquid dye, yielding resist dye patterns

questions.explanation: Tie-dye relies on physical thread knots blocking dyes, creating organic spiral patterns.

questions.question: Fabric painting adjustments 'Puff Paint' (3D paint) how puff effect is activated?

options.A: Applying heat gun/steam to dry paint, causing chemical blowing agents to expand and puff up

questions.explanation: Puff paints contain heat-reactive chemicals that expand under heat sweeps, creating beautiful raised velvet textures.

questions.question: Tote bag sewing patterns strap attachment coordinates why 'X-box stitch' is used on joint points?

options.A: Distributes weight load across square grid pattern, preventing handle pulling off fabric

questions.explanation: X-box sewing patterns structurally reinforce strap joints, essential for holding heavy bag volumes.

questions.question: Fabric paint adjustments 'Diluent type' does mixing rubbing alcohol with fabric paint create what texture?

options.A: Bleeds paint colors quickly, creating beautiful watercolor wash splash patterns on fabric

questions.explanation: Alcohol spreads pigments fast, flashing off quickly to yield beautiful tie-dye bleeding textures.

questions.question: Tote Bag & Fabric Painting craft business branding why custom hang tags are used?

options.A: Prints brand stories, washing instruction alerts, price coordinates and handmade authentic logos

questions.explanation: Hang tags convey luxury artisanal branding details to consumers, supporting premium prices.

questions.question: Fabric painting me outlines sealing 'Outliner tubes / Gutta dimensional outliners' why used in Indian traditional block printing styles?

options.A: Enables drawing raised relief outlines to contain interior liquid color runs and gives clean gold/silver metallic looks
options.C: Turns paint layer to transparent film

questions.explanation: Dimensional outliners create beautiful relief borders, mimicking authentic zari/gold embroidery lines on fabric designs.

questions.question: Tote bag construction sewings 'Seam allowance widths' why standard 1.5 cm margins are maintained in canvas panels?

options.A: Provides enough grip fabric inside seam, preventing thread slippage and separation under daily stress

questions.explanation: Heavy canvas weave is prone to fraying, wide seam allowance margins prevent joints tearing apart under heavy bag loads.

questions.question: Fabric painted tote bags storage conditions why they should never be folded face-to-face when stored hot weather?

options.A: Heat makes acrylic sticky (faces fuse together, peeling them apart tears paint design off fabric)
options.C: Bags attract micro insects in folds

questions.explanation: Acrylic paints remain thermoplastic, soft under high storage temperatures. Storing face-to-face causes mutual fusion defects.

questions.question: Fabric painting custom business 'Eco-friendly tag' requirements did canvas cotton bags qualify as plastic replacement?

options.A: Yes, natural cotton canvas is highly biodegradable, reusable, washable, and completely plastic-free
options.B: No, canvas contains active PVC microplastics
options.C: Only if painted with metallic colors

questions.explanation: 100% Cotton canvas tote bags are standard eco-friendly alternatives to single-use polyethylene grocery bags.

questions.question: Tote Bag sewing reinforcing 'Box corners bottom'?

options.A: Creates flat rectangular bottom base, allowing bag to stand upright and hold bulky items comfortably

questions.explanation: Boxed corners transition flat envelopes to 3D rectangular box storage capacities, standard in high-quality tote bags.

options.A: Binds paint polymers inside fabric fibers, ensuring design survives regular machine washing cycles

questions.explanation: Heat-setting cures textile mediums completely, locking pigments into fibers for lifetime durability.
